note: Payment initiation is now bundled with order creation. Shopper orders (POST /v1/orders) trigger payment immediately. Merchant orders (POST /v1/merchant/orders) produce a QR code; payment fires when the customer scans. The existing qrpay endpoint is invoked internally when a customer scans a merchant-created order QR code — it no longer requires a separate client call to initiate payment.

endpoints.description: Called internally by the qrpay module when a customer scans a merchant-created order QR code. The orderId embedded in the QR links the payment attempt back to the order. This endpoint is NOT called directly by merchant clients for order payment — it is invoked by the customer app scan flow.

orderId.description: Order reference embedded in the QR code by POST /v1/merchant/orders.

endpoints.description: Braintree checkout carries a required orderId so the transaction links back to a pre-created order. Used when paymentMethod=BRAINTREE on POST /v1/orders.

amount.description: Optional override when allowed by the checkout flow. The order total is the authoritative amount.
